description_long: This is a two-story suburban house situated on a rectangular grassy plot intersected by two paved roads. The house features a prominent gable roof with dark shingles and a white exterior, complemented by multiple symmetrically arranged windows. A driveway leads up to a garage attached to the right side of the house, while the main entrance is set back with a small porch area. The windows are rectangular and evenly spaced, providing a balanced facade. The surrounding landscape is simple, with no visible fencing, trees, or additional structures. The overall design is clean and functional, typical of modern American residential neighborhoods.
description: A two-story white house with a gable roof, attached garage, and symmetrical windows, set on a grassy lot intersected by paved roads.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, attached garage, and driveway leading from the road.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the entryway, porch, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the back and side of the house, with the garage and driveway visible.
description_view_3: Direct rear view showing the back facade and the intersection of the two roads.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a small porch, steps, and minimal decorative elements
